name: EchoClip
description: record and save clips of your gameplay locally.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: toggle the recording system on or off.

target-fps.name: Target FPS
target-fps.description: the framerate of the output video.

bitrate.name: Bitrate (Mbps)
bitrate.description: the video quality. higher is better but uses more space.

output-res.name: Output Resolution
output-res.description: The vertical resolution of the saved clip.

recording-scale.name: Recording Scale
recording-scale.description: Scale down recording resolution to improve performance

storage-limit.name: Storage Limit (GB)
storage-limit.description: automatically delete old clips when this limit is reached.

att-clip-count.name: Attempts to Clip
att-clip-count.description: how many attempts back the clip should go (for the hotkey).

clip-keybind.name: Clip Hotkey
clip-keybind.description: the key to manually save a clip (default F6).

clip-on-new-best.name: Clip on New Best
clip-on-new-best.description: automatically save a clip when you hit a new best percent

auto-performance.name: Auto Performance Mode
auto-performance.description: automatically lower settings if your PC is struggling or has bad specs.

record-practice.name: Record in Practice
record-practice.description: whether to record while in practice mode.

record-startpos.name: Record with StartPos
record-startpos.description: whether to record when using a startpos.

show-encoder.name: Show Encoder on Start
show-encoder.description: shows a notification with the active codec when you start a level.

cleanup-days.name: Auto-Cleanup (Days)
cleanup-days.description: automatically delete clips older than this many days. set to 0 to disable.

april-fools.name: Enable Seasonal Events
april-fools.description: Enables fun surprises on specific days (like April 1st).

max-ram-usage.name: Max RAM Usage (MB)
max-ram-usage.description: how much RAM to use for buffering frames. higher = less lag but more memory usage.
